name: Lemon Verbena Ricotta Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. The night before, place the ricotta cheese in a paper coffee filter set inside a strainer over a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
2. In the morning, discard the whey collected in the bowl.
3. Process the egg yolks and ricotta cheese in a food processor or blender until smooth.
4. Add milk, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt to the mixture. Blend until completely combined.
5. Fold in chopped lemon rind and finely minced lemon verbena.
6. Beat the egg whites in a separate bowl until just stiff but still moist.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
8. Heat 2 teaspoons of vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat.
9. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet, and cook until the tops are bubbly and appear dry.
10. Flip the pancakes and cook the second side until golden brown. Repeat with the remaining batter.
11. Serve immediately.
